Title: User initiates registration
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Register" button.
2. User fills out the registration form with valid details.
3. User submits the form.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the login page, and a success message appears.

Title: User initiates login
Preconditions: User has registered and is on the homepage
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Login" button.
2. User enters valid credentials.
3. User submits the form.
Expected Result: User is logged in and redirected to the dashboard.

Title: User sees flash messages
Test Steps:
1. User performs an action that triggers a flash message.
2. System displays the flash message.
Expected Result: Flash message is displayed to the user.

Title: Registration triggers notification
Test Steps:
1. User completes the registration process.
2. System sends a notification to the notification center.
Expected Result: Notification is sent to the notification center.

Title: Login triggers notification
Test Steps:
1. User successfully logs in.
2. System sends a notification to the notification center.
Expected Result: Notification is sent to the notification center.

Title: Flash messages are sent to notification center
Test Steps:
1. User sees a flash message.
2. System sends the flash message to the notification center.
Expected Result: Flash message is sent to the notification center.

Title: Notification triggers event creation
Test Steps:
1. Notification center receives a notification.
2. Notification center triggers event creation.
Expected Result: Event creation is triggered.

Title: Notification triggers event joining/viewing
Test Steps:
1. Notification center receives a notification.
2. Notification center triggers event joining/viewing.
Expected Result: Event joining/viewing is triggered.

Title: Notification triggers profile access
Test Steps:
1. Notification center receives a notification.
2. Notification center triggers profile access.
Expected Result: Profile access is triggered.

Title: Notification triggers application exit
Test Steps:
1. Notification center receives a notification.
2. Notification center triggers application exit.
Expected Result: Application exit is triggered.

Title: User initiates newsletter activity
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Newsletter" button.
2. User initiates the newsletter activity.
Expected Result: User is directed to the newsletter management page.

Title: Newsletter activity triggers newsletter management
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the newsletter activity.
2. System triggers newsletter management.
Expected Result: Newsletter management is triggered.

Title: Newsletter management interacts with project data
Test Steps:
1. Newsletter management interacts with project data.
2. Project data is updated.
Expected Result: Project data is updated.

Title: Project data management uses PostgreSQL
Test Steps:
1. Project data management interacts with PostgreSQL.
2. Data is stored/retrieved from PostgreSQL.
Expected Result: Data is successfully stored/retrieved from PostgreSQL.

Title: User initiates newsletter activity
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Newsletter" button.
2. User initiates the newsletter activity.
Expected Result: User is directed to the newsletter management page.

Title: User exits the application
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Exit" button.
2. User confirms exit.
Expected Result: Application closes and user is logged out.
